title: NEP CELL Committee
content: Committees NEP CELL COMMITTEE COMMITTEE FOR MAKING GUIDELINES ON MULTIPLE ENTRY AND EXIT IN THE ACADEMIC PROGRAMMES OF HIGHER EDUCATION INSTITUTIONS COMMITTEE FOR MAKING GUIDELINES FOR APPRENTICESHIP/INTERNSHIP EMBEDDED DEGREE PROGRAMME AS PART OF THE CURRICULUM OF THE GENERAL DEGREE PROGRAMME COMMITTEE FOR WORKING ON AMENDMENT OF INSTITUTIONS DEEMED TO BE UNIVERSITY REGULATIONS TO FACILITATE VOCATIONAL EDUCATION TO ENHANCE EMPLOYABILITY
